brand.name: Forge Digital
brand.tagline: Better websites, clearer online presence, and smarter follow-up for local businesses.

hero.eyebrow: Digital help for busy local businesses
hero.headline: A stronger online presence for businesses too busy to fix it themselves.
hero.subheadline: Forge Digital helps local businesses improve their website, make it easier for customers to reach them, and follow up with inquiries without adding more work to the day.
hero.photoAlt: Small business owner speaking with a customer
hero.photoCardText: For restaurants, service businesses, agents, shops, and small firms that need practical digital help without jargon.

services.title: Simple improvements that make your business easier to find, trust, and contact.
services.intro: Most local businesses do not need a complicated digital overhaul. They need the right few pieces cleaned up, connected, and maintained.

cards.title: Website Design & Refresh
cards.description: A polished site that explains what you do, builds trust quickly, works on mobile, and gives visitors a clear next step.
cards.footer: Clear pages, better structure, stronger first impression

cards.title: Lead Capture & Contact Setup
cards.description: Forms, booking links, calls, emails, and inquiry routing set up so interested customers can reach you without friction.

cards.title: Ongoing Support & Smart Automation
cards.description: Practical support for updates, follow-up, review requests, simple reporting, and small automations that save time.

process.title: A straightforward process that respects your time.
process.text: We keep the work focused, practical, and easy to understand, so you can get real improvements without becoming a web or software expert.

steps.title: Learn about your business
steps.body: We look at your current website, customer journey, contact process, and the places where opportunities may be slipping through.

steps.title: Improve the parts that matter most
steps.body: We focus on the changes most likely to help: clearer pages, better calls to action, easier inquiry paths, and useful follow-up.

steps.title: Launch and support
steps.body: We get the improvements live, make sure they work on real devices, and stay available for updates as your business changes.

example.title: What this can look like for a busy local business.
example.body: Instead of chasing a dozen disconnected tools, we help create a clearer path from someone discovering your business to actually getting in touch.
example.photoAlt: Team members reviewing a business plan together
points: A cleaner homepage that explains the offer in plain language
A visible contact path for calls, forms, and appointments
A simple follow-up message so new inquiries are not forgotten
A maintainable setup the owner can understand
before: Contact form is hard to find

packages.title: Start with the piece that would make the biggest difference.
packages.text: No pressure to buy a huge package. We can begin with a focused improvement and expand only when it makes sense.

cards.label: Good first step
cards.title: Website Refresh
cards.description: For businesses with an existing site that needs to look more current, read more clearly, and guide customers to the next step.

cards.label: Most common
cards.title: Website + Inquiry Setup
cards.description: For businesses that want a stronger website plus a better way to capture, route, and respond to new opportunities.

cards.label: For ongoing help
cards.title: Ongoing Support
cards.description: For owners who want a reliable digital partner for updates, small improvements, and practical tools that save time.

proof.title: A more professional online presence can make everyday business easier.
proof.photoAlt: Small business team speaking in a warm office setting

items.title: Look established
items.text: Customers get a clearer, more confident first impression.

items.title: Be easier to reach
items.text: The next step is obvious whether someone wants to call, book, or ask a question.

items.title: Save owner time
items.text: Small systems handle repeatable tasks so fewer things depend on memory.

items.title: Support real growth
items.text: The setup stays simple enough to use, maintain, and improve.

items.question: Do I need to know exactly what I want?
items.answer: No. A big part of the first call is helping identify what would make the most practical difference for your business.

items.question: Can you work with my existing website?
items.answer: Usually, yes. If your current site has a solid foundation, we can refresh and improve it instead of rebuilding everything.

items.question: Do you only build websites?
items.answer: Websites are often the starting point, but we can also help with inquiry forms, follow-up, booking links, review requests, and simple operational tools.

items.question: Will this be complicated to manage?
items.answer: The goal is the opposite. We keep the setup understandable and can provide ongoing support when you do not want to manage it yourself.

contact.title: Let’s talk about what your business needs.
contact.text: Tell us what feels outdated, slow, or harder than it should be. We will help you find the simplest useful next step.

finalCta.title: Let’s improve the way your business shows up online.
finalCta.text: Book a free call and we will talk through your website, customer contact process, and the highest-value improvement to make first.
